name: rmo-copilot
description: Rocky Mountain Outlaws lumber + trucking copilot skills, tools, and KB.

tools.name: Scrape current form
tools.description: Read the host page's current form (fields, labels, values) so the copilot can reason about what the driver has filled in.

formId.description: Optional id of the <form> to scrape. Omit to scrape the focused form.

tools.name: lookup_regulations
tools.description: Search the trucking-regulations knowledge base by topic. Returns titled excerpts with source attribution so the copilot can cite [n] in its answer. Optional scoringMode and hybridWeight knobs let the copilot bias toward literal matches when the query contains rare regulation IDs.

query.description: Plain-language topic or question, e.g. 'Alberta tridem weight limits' or 'spring road bans'.

limit.description: Maximum results to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

scoringMode.description: Override the retriever's scoring path: 'lexical' (TF-IDF only — bias for rare proper nouns / regulation IDs), 'embedding' (cosine only), or 'hybrid' (default; min-max-mixed). Invalid values fall back to the configured default.

hybridWeight.description: Cosine weight in [0,1] when scoringMode is hybrid; lexical gets (1 - weight). Lower values (e.g. 0.3) bias toward literal-match scoring. Only consulted under hybrid mode.

tools.name: draft_timesheet
tools.description: Draft a driver timesheet record from the day's trip details. Returns a structured draft for the driver to review and approve before it is recorded. Flags HOS-cap violations.

driverName.description: Driver's full legal name as it should appear on the timesheet.

tripDate.description: Date of the trip in YYYY-MM-DD form.

hoursOnDuty.description: Total hours on duty including driving and non-driving work.

tripDescription.description: Free-text notes about route, stops, or unusual conditions (optional).

tools.name: draft_dvir
tools.description: Draft a Driver Vehicle Inspection Report (DVIR) per Alberta NSC Schedule 1. Requires driver approval before the record lands. Returns a structured draft the driver can review, with compliance warnings for missing mechanic signatures on major defects and mismatched defect/status pairs.

odometer.description: Mileage at the time of inspection.

location.description: Where the inspection took place (yard, depot, roadside).

defectStatus.description: Overall defect status: 'none' (no defects observed), 'minor' (loggable, vehicle remains in service), or 'major' (mechanic certification required before return to service).

defects.description: Itemized defects observed during inspection. Required when defectStatus is 'minor' or 'major'. Each entry has a Schedule 1 category and a free-text description.

defectNotes.description: Free-text narrative supplementing the defects list (optional).

photos.description: Photo attachments documenting defects (optional). The LLM may have analyzed these to populate defectNotes.

url.description: Resolvable URL or attachment id for the photo.

caption.description: Optional caption describing what the photo shows.

mechanicName.description: Name of the mechanic certifying repairs. Required when defectStatus is 'major'.

mechanicSignedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the mechanic signed off (optional, paired with mechanicName).

tools.name: Search the web
tools.description: Search the public web for current information not in the regulations KB. Returns a ranked list of results (title, short excerpt, URL) — NOT full page contents. Use for current events, diesel prices, weather, road conditions, news. When a result looks promising, call web_fetch with its URL to read the page in depth. If the first search comes up empty or irrelevant, reformulate the query and search again before giving up. Supports Tavily (premium), Brave Search, or DuckDuckGo (free fallback).

query.description: Plain-language search query, e.g. 'Edmonton diesel price today' or 'Transport Canada winter tire bulletin 2026'.

limit.description: Maximum results to return (1-10). Defaults to 5.

recency.description: Bias toward recently-published pages: 'day' | 'week' | 'month' | 'year'. Silently ignored on providers that don't expose freshness controls.

region.description: BCP-47 locale ('en-CA') or ISO country code ('CA') for region-biased ranking. Silently ignored on providers that don't expose a region knob.

tools.name: Fetch a web page
tools.description: Fetch a single web page by URL and return its readable text, so you can read a result in depth rather than relying on the short excerpt from web_search. Typical flow: web_search to find candidate URLs, then web_fetch on the most promising one. If a fetched page doesn't answer the question, fetch another result or refine the search. Only http(s) URLs are supported.

url.description: Absolute http(s) URL to fetch, e.g. a result URL returned by web_search.

maxChars.description: Maximum characters of readable text to return (500-20000). Defaults to 8000. Increase when a page is long and the answer wasn't in the first chunk.

tools.name: summarize_pay_period
tools.description: Roll up the driver's recorded timesheets across a pay-period window. Returns total days worked, driving hours, on-duty hours, non-driving on-duty hours, a chronological per-day breakdown, and period-level HOS warnings (70h-in-7-days cap). Read-only — no approval needed. Defaults to the current pay period when no inputs are supplied.

presetId.description: Pay-period chip identifier: 'current-pay-period' or 'last-pay-period'. Resolves against the rmo-copilot manifest's anchor (2026-01-05) and length (14 days). Wins when explicit from/to are omitted. Defaults to 'current-pay-period'.

from.description: Explicit window start in YYYY-MM-DD form. When both from and to are supplied, this pair overrides presetId.

to.description: Explicit window end in YYYY-MM-DD form (inclusive). Paired with from.

driverName.description: Optional case-insensitive substring filter on the recorded driver name. Useful when a single user has timesheets recorded for multiple drivers (rare; defaults to all of the calling user's timesheets).

onboarding.title: Welcome to your RMO copilot
onboarding.body: I help with timesheets, inspections, and trucking regulations. Ask anything in plain language — type your question in the box below.

onboarding.title: Look up the rules
onboarding.body: Need a weight limit, an hours-of-service clock, or a road-ban check? Just ask. I cite the trucking-regulations knowledge base so you can trust the answer.
onboarding.example: What are Alberta weight limits for a tridem?

onboarding.title: File a DVIR
onboarding.body: I can walk you through a Driver Vehicle Inspection Report step by step — defect categories, signatures, and what counts as a major defect. I confirm with you before recording anything.
onboarding.example: Help me fill out my pre-trip inspection

onboarding.title: Check your hours
onboarding.body: Ask me to roll up your timesheets for a pay period. I total your driving and on-duty hours and flag any 70-hours-in-7-days breaches.

onboarding.title: Find this again
onboarding.body: Tap the question-mark in the top bar any time to replay this walkthrough. Use the gear to set your language, timezone, and vehicle.
